aboutPage.heading: Welcome to Ruhulqudus Academy
aboutPage.intro: A comprehensive digital educational platform dedicated to teaching the Holy Quran and Arabic to non‑Arabic speakers, combining authentic methodology with cutting‑edge technology.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To be the world's leading reference for teaching Quran and Arabic to non‑native speakers, by merging rigorous scientific curricula with intelligent interactive tools.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To empower every student to understand the Book of Allah and speak Arabic, through an integrated educational journey guided by specialized teachers, surrounded by a supportive interactive community, and crowned with accredited certificates.

features.methodologyDesc: Built on the 'Word‑by‑Word Analysis' method developed by Dr. Jehan Ziad, enabling students to understand each Quranic term through color‑coded analytical tables and linguistic comparisons.
features.teachersDesc: Our academic team includes over 300 teachers, graduates of Al‑Azhar and Islamic universities, carefully selected and trained on the platform's unique methodology.
features.libraryDesc: A luxurious interactive library containing foundational works in Quranic and Arabic sciences, browsable through an advanced e‑reader with full content protection.
features.gamifiedDesc: Learning with us is enjoyable! We provide points, badges, and leaderboards to motivate students to persevere and engage in healthy competition.
features.communityDesc: A safe, gender‑separated student community that allows sharing achievements, asking questions, and joining group Quran challenges.
features.certificatesDesc: Electronic and printed accredited certificates upon course completion, with the ability to verify authenticity through our website.

aboutPage.founderDesc: With over 20 years of experience teaching Arabic, Dr. Jehan has dedicated her life to helping students master the language of the Quran. Her methodology combines classical pedagogy with modern technology.

cta.joinDesc: Whether you seek to learn the basics of Tajweed or dive deep into Tafsir and language, your place is with us. Begin your journey with Ruhulqudus Academy now.

privacyPage.heading: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.

sections.informationWeCollectContent: Registration Information: Name, email, country, gender, preferred language when creating an account. Payment Information: Processed via external payment gateways (PayPal). We do not store your credit card details on our servers. User Content: Lessons, reviews, community messages, uploaded files. Usage Data: Pages visited, visit time, browser type for service improvement.
sections.howWeUseYourDataContent: To provide our educational services (enrolling you in courses, issuing certificates). To communicate with you (notifications, administrative messages). To improve the platform and user experience. For legal compliance and fraud prevention.
sections.informationSharingContent: We do not sell your data to third parties. We may share information with: Teachers within the scope of your courses only. Service providers (hosting, email) bound by confidentiality agreements. Legal authorities if required.
sections.dataProtectionContent: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, damage, or loss. All communication is encrypted via SSL.
sections.cookiesContent: We use essential session cookies for the platform to function (login, language preferences). We may use anonymous analytics cookies (such as Google Analytics) to improve performance.
sections.yourRightsContent: You have the right to access and correct your data, delete your account and data, object to processing or withdraw consent, and contact us at info@ruhulqudus.com.
sections.childrenPrivacyContent: We do not allow children under 13 to create accounts without parental consent.
sections.policyChangesContent: We will notify you of any material changes via email or platform notification.

privacyPage.contactText: Contact our data protection officer at info@ruhulqudus.com.
privacyPage.trustText: Join thousands of learners who trust us with their data.

termsPage.heading: Terms and Conditions
termsPage.intro: Welcome to Ruhulqudus Academy. These Terms and Conditions govern your use of our website, platform, and services. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.definitionsContent: "Platform" refers to the Ruhulqudus Academy website and all related services. "User," "you," or "student" refers to any person who creates an account or uses the platform. "Teacher" refers to an approved instructor providing courses on the platform. "Content" includes all text, images, videos, audio, and other materials available on the platform.
sections.accountRegistrationContent: You must provide accurate, complete, and current information during registration. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must be at least 13 years old to create an account. Users under 18 must have parental consent. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
sections.paymentsAndSubscriptionsContent: All prices are displayed in US Dollars (USD) unless otherwise stated. Payments are processed securely through third-party gateways (e.g., PayPal). We do not store full credit card details. Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled before the renewal date. You may cancel a subscription at any time; access continues until the end of the current billing period.
sections.refundPolicyContent: Individual course purchases may be refunded within 7 days if less than 25% of the course content has been accessed. Subscription fees are non-refundable except where required by applicable law. Refund requests for printed certificates are handled on a case-by-case basis.
sections.userConductContent: You agree not to: Share, copy, or distribute any platform content without permission. Use the platform for any unlawful purpose. Harass, abuse, or harm other users or teachers. Attempt to circumvent any content protection measures (e.g., screenshots, screen recording of lessons or library materials). Share your account credentials with others.
sections.intellectualPropertyContent: All course materials, videos, the digital library, and platform design are the exclusive property of Ruhulqudus Academy. You may not reproduce, modify, distribute, or create derivative works from our content without prior written consent. User-generated content (e.g., forum posts) remains your property, but you grant us a non-exclusive license to display it on the platform.
sections.teacherContentContent: Teachers are independent contractors and are responsible for the content they deliver. We do not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of third-party content but strive to maintain quality standards through our moderation process.
sections.limitationOfLiabilityContent: Ruhulqudus Academy provides the platform "as is" and makes no warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.
sections.terminationContent: We may terminate or suspend your account without prior notice if you violate these terms. Upon termination, your right to access the platform ceases immediately. Provisions related to intellectual property, liability, and indemnification survive termination.
sections.changesToTermsContent: We may modify these terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or platform notification. Continued use of the platform after changes indicates your acceptance of the revised terms.
sections.governingLawContent: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction where Ruhulqudus Academy operates. Any disputes shall be resolved through amicable negotiation; if unresolved, through the competent courts.
sections.contactTermsContent: For any questions regarding these terms, contact us at: info@ruhulqudus.com

cta.title: Ready to Join?
cta.text: Create an account and start your Arabic journey today.

contactPage.heading: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Have a question about our courses, need help with your account, or want to explore partnership opportunities? Our dedicated team is here to assist you on your Quranic journey. Reach out anytime — we respond within 24 hours.
contactPage.workingHoursContent: Our support team is available from Monday to Friday, 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Istanbul time, GMT+3). We observe Islamic holidays and will respond to messages received during weekends or holidays on the next business day.
contactPage.formSubtitle: Fill in the form below and we’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
contactPage.partnershipsContent: We welcome collaborations with Islamic centers, mosques, and educational organizations. If you represent an institution and would like to offer our courses to your community, please email us at partners@ruhulqudus.com with details.

cta.title: Not a Member Yet?
cta.text: Join over 1,000 students worldwide and begin your structured journey through the Quran and Arabic language. Our free trial gives you full access to your first three lessons.

certificationPage.heading: Certifications
certificationPage.intro: Earn recognized credentials at Ruhulqudus Academy.
certificationPage.teacherDesc: Become a certified Ruhulqudus instructor and teach Arabic professionally.

steps.step1: Complete the 'How to Teach Arabic' course.
steps.step2: Submit a sample lesson for review.
steps.step3: Pass an interview with Dr. Jehan.

certificationPage.studentDesc: Receive a Certificate of Completion for every course you finish.

studentSteps.step1: Enroll in any course and complete all lessons.
studentSteps.step2: Pass the course quizzes and final assessment.
studentSteps.step3: Download your personalized certificate with your name and the instructor's signature.
studentSteps.step4: Share your achievement on social media or add it to your CV.

certificationPage.valueDesc: Your certificate is recognized worldwide and includes a unique verification code. You can also order a printed, signed certificate delivered to your door. Build your credentials with Ruhulqudus.
certificationPage.verifyDesc: Enter your certificate ID to verify its authenticity.
certificationPage.invalid: This certificate could not be verified.

cta.title: Join and Get Certified
cta.text: Start your journey today and earn your first certificate.

affiliatePage.heading: Earn While You Share
affiliatePage.subtitle: Join our affiliate program and earn 20% commission for every student or teacher you bring to the Academy.
affiliatePage.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to start earning.
affiliatePage.step1Desc: Copy your unique referral link and share it with your network.
affiliatePage.step2Desc: When someone signs up or purchases a course using your link, it's tracked automatically.
affiliatePage.step3Desc: Earn 20% commission on every qualifying purchase. Request payout anytime.
affiliatePage.whyJoinDesc: Our affiliate program is designed to reward you generously while you help spread the knowledge of Arabic and Quran.

benefits.realTimeTrackingDesc: Monitor your referrals and earnings in your dashboard.
benefits.easyWithdrawalsDesc: Request payouts via PayPal or bank transfer.
benefits.dedicatedSupportDesc: Our team helps you succeed as an affiliate partner.

faqs.question: How do I track my earnings?
faqs.answer: You can view your referrals and commission balance in your affiliate dashboard after logging in.

faqs.question: When do I get paid?
faqs.answer: You can request a payout once your commission balance reaches $50. Payments are processed within 5 business days.

faqs.question: Is there a limit on how much I can earn?
faqs.answer: No, there is no earning cap. The more you refer, the more you earn!

cta.title: Start Earning Today
cta.text: Join our affiliate program and earn 20% on every referral.

certification.heading: Become a certified instructor
certification.description: Earn the official Ruhulqudus Teaching Certificate and unlock global opportunities.
